CustomField.description: For Medical Sponsorship or Medical Advisory board or Collaborative Event, include details describing the event venue (with supporting documentation demonstrating that the event will be held at a venue that is appropriate and conducive to the main purpose of the meeting, the city and country where it is located, et cetera).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For Medical Sponsorship or Medical Advisory board or Collaborative Event, include details describing the event venue (with supporting documentation demonstrating that the event will be held at a venue that is appropriate and conducive to the main purpose of the meeting, the city and country where it is located, et cetera).
CustomField.label: Location and/or Venue Details
